name: Snickers - Your Cohabitant
description:
-Safe Intro-

On a research mission to an dangerous planet, Snickers returns from her day out sample collecting. She's so exhausted from her work she can't even take her suit off herself...

Feedback and reviews are greatly appreciated! And don't forget my discord! God this has gotta be like the 90th revision of this bot grrr.

Art and character by Lenyavok (Twitter: NSFW | SFW Bluesky: NSFW | SFW). Collage of their artwork and bot by me.
